steps_completed.task: Create Command interface and types: Command<T> with execute(), undo(), description. Concrete types: AssumptionAddCommand, AssumptionRemoveCommand, AssumptionClearAllCommand, ProbabilityEditCommand with DraftEdit interface.
Create HistoryContext with useReducer: undo/redo stacks, PUSH/UNDO/REDO/CLEAR actions, 50-action cap. Exposes useHistory() and useOptionalHistory() hooks.

Implement assumption commands: useHistoryAssumptions wraps useAssumptions with history tracking. Each mutation creates a command, executes it, and pushes to history. AssumptionContext updated with setAllAssumptions for undo support.
Implement probability edit draft buffer: useDraftEdits() hook stages edits locally with undo/redo via ProbabilityEditCommand. CptPanel updated to use draft flow with stageDraft/commitDrafts pattern.
Wire HistoryProvider into MarketDetail: active markets wrapped in HistoryProvider > AssumptionProvider. All trading panels (AssumptionPanel, CptPanel, EventTradePanel, graph) inside provider scope.
Add undo/redo toolbar UI: UndoRedoToolbar component with undo/redo buttons, disabled states, tooltips showing command descriptions, status text. Placed in MarketDetail header area.
Add keyboard shortcuts: useUndoRedoKeyboard() hook with Ctrl+Z/Cmd+Z for undo, Ctrl+Shift+Z/Ctrl+Y for redo. Filters out events when activeElement is input/textarea/select/contenteditable.
Add tests: HistoryContext reducer tests (13), command execute/undo tests (12), useDraftEdits integration tests (8), keyboard shortcut tests (14), AssumptionContext tests (16). All 63 tests pass.
